'''Vault''' may refer to:

* [[Vault (The Last Horizon)]]
* [[Vault (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)]]

''This disambiguation page separates different subjects that share a name across the Willverse's series.''

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Disambiguation]]
[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
